query:
SELECT dl.id, dl.participantId, p.displayName, dl.dayNumber, dl.logDate, dl.exerciseDone, dl.exerciseDuration, dl.exerciseType, CASE WHEN dl.exerciseProofUrl IS NULL OR dl.exerciseProofUrl = '' THEN 'NO_PROOF_URL' ELSE LEFT(dl.exerciseProofUrl, 240) END AS proofSnippet, dl.dayComplete, dl.submittedAt, dl.createdAt, dl.updatedAt
FROM daily_logs dl
JOIN participants p ON p.id = dl.participantId
WHERE (dl.participantId = 60011 OR LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%')
  AND (DATE(dl.createdAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10' OR DATE(dl.updatedAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10' OR dl.logDate BETWEEN '2026-05-08' AND '2026-05-09')
ORDER BY dl.createdAt DESC, dl.id DESC;
command:

FROM daily_logs dl
JOIN participants p ON p.id = dl.participantId
WHERE (dl.participantId = 60011 OR LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%')
  AND (DATE(dl.createdAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10' OR DATE(dl.updatedAt) BETWEEN '2026-05-09' AND '2026-05-10' OR dl.logDate BETWEEN '2026-05-08' AND '2026-05-09')
ORDER BY dl.createdAt DESC, dl.id DESC;
